title: Error on "rank() over (order by sum(.."
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE student_scores (student_id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(100), score FLOAT CHECK (score >= 0));
INSERT INTO student_scores (student_id, subject, score) VALUES (1, 'math', 85.5);
INSERT INTO student_scores (student_id, subject, score) VALUES (2, 'science', 90.0);
INSERT INTO student_scores (student_id, subject, score) VALUES (1, 'science', NULL);
SELECT student_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM student_scores GROUP BY student_id ORDER BY total_score DESC;
key_bug_features: Using alias in rank() over clause causes error
